soap_issues.message: Required fact text missing or changed in assessment: clinical_event_text='The clinical_event field documents event type medication started; event label Omeprazole started for GERD; event summary: Initial GERD symptoms were documented and Omeprazole was started..'.

Required fact text missing or changed in assessment: clinical_event_text='The clinical_event field documents event type symptom improvement event; event label GERD symptoms improved; event summary: Follow-up documented improved reflux symptoms while Omeprazole continued..'.
